name: remotty
description: Setup and operations for the remotty Windows bridge for Codex and Telegram.

interface.shortDescription: Set up and run the Windows Codex Telegram bridge from plugin commands
interface.longDescription: Use plugin commands to configure the Telegram bot token, pair an allowed sender, start or inspect the bridge, and run live checks without exposing secrets in terminal output.
defaultPrompt: Configure the Telegram bridge plugin-first, pair my Telegram account, and start the Windows bridge
